headline: Accenture Ties AI And Network Intelligence To Evolve Consulting Business Model
summary: Accenture (NYSE:ACN) has agreed to acquire Ookla, a company focused on network intelligence and connectivity insights. Accenture has also entered a collaboration with Mistral AI to support secure, enterprise-scale adoption of artificial intelligence. These moves expand Accenture's capabilities in AI and network performance for clients across multiple industries. Accenture operates as a global consulting and technology services firm, working across cloud, AI, and digital transformation...
